overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a character walking through a rain-soaked futuristic city at night. The journey transitions from neon-lit covered market alleys through commercial districts and industrial underpasses, showcasing dense urban environments with dynamic lighting and atmospheric weather effects.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market alley with neon-lit vending machines

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through covered market alley following the flow of pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian holding umbrella walking ahead through the alley

entered.detail: corrugated metal security shutters lining both sides of the narrow alley
illuminated red vending machine with 'BURRITO' signage glowing brightly
overhead covering protecting the market walkway from rain
pervasive pink neon lighting reflecting off wet surfaces

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow covered market alley bathed in pink neon light. Metal shutters line both sides while a burrito vending machine glows red on the right. The pavement is wet and reflective, and crowds move in the same direction ahead, with one pedestrian carrying an umbrella visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with karaoke bars and hotels

events.description: exits covered alley into open commercial street with visible sky and taller buildings
turns right following the crowd flow around a street corner

agents.ego_description: navigating through busier commercial district with prominent neon signage overhead

entered.detail: tall vertical neon sign reading 'KARAOKE' in cyan lighting
pink neon hotel sign mounted on building facade
multi-story buildings with illuminated windows and advertisements

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered alley, the scene opens into a wider commercial street with partial sky visibility. A prominent cyan 'KARAOKE' sign rises on the right while hotel signage glows pink nearby. The character turns right with the crowd, leaving the metal shutters behind as the environment becomes more open and bustling.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow back alley with food vendors and graffiti

events.description: turns into narrower back alley with reduced lighting and fewer pedestrians

agents.ego_description: walking through dimly lit back alley passing vending machines and graffiti-covered walls

notable_agents.action: homeless person sitting against wall near trash

entered.detail: pink neon sign reading 'SPICY NOODLES' above a doorway
concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti and street art
glowing vending machine with illuminated product display

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrower back alley marked by a 'SPICY NOODLES' neon sign ahead. The walls are covered in graffiti, and the crowd thins out significantly. A vending machine glows on the right while a homeless person sits against the left wall. The lighting becomes dimmer and more artificial compared to the previous commercial street.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial underpass with red emergency lighting and debris

events.description: lighting shifts to dominant red neon as entering industrial underpass
enters covered industrial area with parked vehicles and construction materials

agents.ego_description: traversing industrial underpass with scattered debris and parked cars visible

entered.detail: concrete parking structure with multiple levels and balconies
intense red lighting illuminating the industrial corridor
chain-link fence with metal posts blocking off construction area
scattered wooden pallets, barrels, and construction materials

segments.scene_description: The environment shifts dramatically to an industrial underpass bathed in red emergency lighting. A multi-level parking structure rises on the left while metal fences line the right. Construction debris litters the ground, and the area is nearly deserted except for parked vehicles. The atmosphere changes from commercial to industrial decay.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street under elevated highway with traffic lights

events.description: exits underpass onto open street under elevated overpass with visible traffic

agents.ego_description: walking along sidewalk under the overpass approaching a crosswalk

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with glowing red umbrella waiting at crosswalk

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass spanning the street above
traffic signal showing red light for pedestrians
yellow striped pedestrian crossing markings on asphalt
tall street light illuminating the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Exiting the industrial underpass, the character emerges onto a wider urban street beneath a massive elevated highway overpass. Traffic lights and crosswalk markings indicate a street crossing, while a pedestrian with a glowing red umbrella waits nearby. The lighting shifts from red to cooler tones as vehicles pass on the road, and the environment opens up significantly.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a vibrant, neon-lit market alley into a bustling commercial street before descending into a dim, gritty back alley. It begins within a narrow covered passage bathed in pink neon, moving past metal shutters and a glowing red burrito machine over reflective, rain-soaked pavement. As the camera emerges from the cover, the scene opens into a wider commercial district where the lighting shifts to cyan and pink hues under a partial sky, following the crowd past a prominent karaoke sign. The environment then narrows once more as the character turns away from the bustle and enters a secluded alleyway marked by a spicy noodles sign. Finally, the atmosphere grows dimmer and more artificial, shifting from the crowded main street to a graffiti-covered corridor where a lone figure sits against a wall.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a claustrophobic industrial underpass into a wide, open urban street. It begins in a zone of industrial decay bathed in red emergency lighting, moving past a multi-level parking structure and metal fences amidst scattered construction debris. As the camera exits the underpass, the oppressive red glow gives way to cooler tones and the environment opens up significantly. The scene then expands beneath a massive elevated highway overpass, passing a pedestrian with a glowing red umbrella waiting at a marked crosswalk. Finally, the movement settles into the flow of the wider city street as vehicles pass by under the towering concrete architecture.
